question: What is the maximum penalty under GDPR Article 83(5) for violating data subject rights?
trace_steps: [TRACE PENDING — run agent on this question, then update trace_steps]

gold_plan_steps.description: Confirm the question pertains to the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), Regulation (EU) 2016/679, and specifically violations of data subject rights under Article 83(5).
Locate and cite GDPR Article 83(5), which addresses administrative fines for infringements including Articles 12 to 22 (data subject rights).
Extract from Article 83(5) the maximum fine: up to EUR 20 million, or 4% of total worldwide annual turnover of the preceding financial year for undertakings, whichever is higher.
Verify no exceptions, defenses, or carve-outs in Article 83(5) or related provisions (e.g., Article 83(1)-(4), (6)) alter the stated maximum penalty for these infringements.
Confirm the reasoning concludes with the exact maximum penalty from Article 83(5) applied to data subject rights violations.
